title: Notification No.106/2004-Cus(NT), dated 23.09.2004
text: 23rd September, 2004 Notification No. 106/2004 - Customs ( N.T) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Board hereby appoints the officers specified in column (5) of the Table below to act in the matters specified in the corresponding entries in columns (2) and (3) of the said Table as officers specified in corresponding entry in column (4) of the said Table for the purpose of adjudication and investigation of such matters , namely :- Table Sl. No. File No. and date Name of the party Designation of Officer Designation of Officer (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) 1 DRI/CRU/6/2003, dated the 25th May, 2003 M/s Baby Marine Exports, West Hill, Calicut and others Commissioner of Customs, Cochin Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), Bangalore. 2 DRI/CRU/5/2003, dated the 25th May, 2003 M/s Baby Marine Exports, West Hill, Calicut and others Commissioner of Customs, Cochin Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), Bangalore. 3 DRI/CHRU/7/2003, dated the 12thJune, 2003 M/s Capithan Exporting Company, Kollam and others Commissioner of Customs, Cochin Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), Bangalore. 4 S/IV/4/03 , dated the 26th July, 2003 M/s Amisha International Bangalore and others Commissioner of Customs, Sea Port, Chennai Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), Bangalore. 5 VIII/48/67/2002-DRI , dated the 21stMarch, 2003 M/s Metal Sales Corporation , Chennai and others Commissioner of Customs (Export), Chennai.
